defaults.hook_cover_term: a tight close up of Cristiano Ronaldo's face celebrating intensely in a red Portugal jersey, mouth open screaming, face filling the frame, sharp and clear

videos.video_subject: Cristiano Ronaldo scoring two goals for Portugal against Uzbekistan at the 2026 World Cup in Houston
videos.video_script: Ronaldo steps up. First goal. Low finish into the net. Portugal take the lead. He is not done. Second goal before half time. A brace. World Cup 2026. At forty one years old. Still the best.
videos.video_terms: Cristiano Ronaldo goal World Cup 2026, Ronaldo scores Portugal Uzbekistan, Ronaldo celebration Portugal red jersey, Ronaldo brace 2026 World Cup, Ronaldo scoring low finish goal, Ronaldo close up face celebrating goal
